'''鈭歯g-s-w''' ('''kangasaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pelletise|pelletise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-s-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pelletise|pelletise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-s-w
|-
! Lemma
| kangasaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingasaw|thingasaw]] || [[word:jingasaw|jingasaw]] || [[word:shingasaw|shingasaw]] || [[word:kingasaw|kingasaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungasaw|thuthungasaw]] || [[word:jujungasaw|jujungasaw]] || [[word:shushungasaw|shushungasaw]] || [[word:kukungasaw|kukungasaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungasaw|thungasaw]] || [[word:jungasaw|jungasaw]] || [[word:shungasaw|shungasaw]] || [[word:kungasaw|kungasaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungasaw|thungasaw]] || [[word:jungasaw|jungasaw]] || [[word:shungasaw|shungasaw]] || [[word:kungasaw|kungasaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengasaw|thengasaw]] || [[word:jengasaw|jengasaw]] || [[word:shengasaw|shengasaw]] || [[word:kengasaw|kengasaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongasaw|thothongasaw]] || [[word:jojongasaw|jojongasaw]] || [[word:shoshongasaw|shoshongasaw]] || [[word:kokongasaw|kokongasaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongasaw|thongasaw]] || [[word:jongasaw|jongasaw]] || [[word:shongasaw|shongasaw]] || [[word:kongasaw|kongasaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongasaw|thongasaw]] || [[word:jongasaw|jongasaw]] || [[word:shongasaw|shongasaw]] || [[word:kongasaw|kongasaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]] || [[word:ngasaw|ngasaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngasaw|th忙ngasaw]] || [[word:j忙ngasaw|j忙ngasaw]] || [[word:sh忙ngasaw|sh忙ngasaw]] || [[word:k忙ngasaw|k忙ngasaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangasaw|thathangasaw]] || [[word:jajangasaw|jajangasaw]] || [[word:shashangasaw|shashangasaw]] || [[word:kakangasaw|kakangasaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangasaw|thangasaw]] || [[word:jangasaw|jangasaw]] || [[word:shangasaw|shangasaw]] || [[word:kangasaw|kangasaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangasaw|thangasaw]] || [[word:jangasaw|jangasaw]] || [[word:shangasaw|shangasaw]] || [[word:kangasaw|kangasaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangasaw|shangasaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangasaw|goshangasaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangasaw|gokishangasaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangasawn眉|shangasawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangasawnkn眉|goshangasawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasawn眉|gokishangasawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangasawsh毛|shangasawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangasawnksh毛|goshangasawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangasawsh毛|gokishangasawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasawro|shangasawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasawnkro|goshangasawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasawro|gokishangasawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasawmu|shangasawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasawnkmu|goshangasawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasawmu|gokishangasawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangasawsher|shangasawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangasawnksher|goshangasawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangasawsher|gokishangasawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangasawng|shangasawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangasawnkng|goshangasawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangasawng|gokishangasawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangasawya|shangasawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangasawnkya|goshangasawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangasawya|gokishangasawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangasawyam|shangasawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangasawnkyam|goshangasawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangasawyam|gokishangasawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangasawn眉sh毛|shangasawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangasawnkn眉sh毛|goshangasawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangasawn眉sh毛|gokishangasawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasawn眉ro|shangasawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasawnkn眉ro|goshangasawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasawn眉ro|gokishangasawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasawn眉mu|shangasawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasawnkn眉mu|goshangasawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasawn眉mu|gokishangasawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangasawsh毛n眉|shangasawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangasawnksh毛n眉|goshangasawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasawsh毛n眉|gokishangasawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasawsh毛ro|shangasawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasawnksh毛ro|goshangasawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasawsh毛ro|gokishangasawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasawsh毛mu|shangasawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasawnksh毛mu|goshangasawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasawsh毛mu|gokishangasawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangasawron眉|shangasawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangasawnkron眉|goshangasawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasawron眉|gokishangasawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangasawrosh毛|shangasawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangasawnkrosh毛|goshangasawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangasawrosh毛|gokishangasawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangasawromu|shangasawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangasawnkromu|goshangasawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangasawromu|gokishangasawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangasawmun眉|shangasawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangasawnkmun眉|goshangasawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangasawmun眉|gokishangasawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangasawmush毛|shangasawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangasawnkmush毛|goshangasawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangasawmush毛|gokishangasawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangasawmuro|shangasawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangasawnkmuro|goshangasawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangasawmuro|gokishangasawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
